title: PM readings / 3-phase current
description: Record R · S · T current (A) and Vibration Dst/dB — manual entry first · Excel optional
valuesRequired: Enter all measurement values as numbers
limitsDbHint: Optional — dashed lines on dB axis (right Y). Leave blank to hide.
importOptionalHint: For bulk or historical data — primary flow is manual entry above
importHint: Template — Current sheet: R/S/T (A) · Vibration sheet: Dst / dB
noTasks: No measurement tasks on this work order — choose type when entering or add to master task list
chartsTitle: Trend charts & history by PM item
readOnly: View only — confirmation.write required to save or import
emptyState: Search and select a work order — or import Excel with a WO number column
howToTestIntro: Manual entry is primary — select a WO and fill the paper form · check ✓/! status above
howToStep1: Log in as technician (W) with confirmation.write — or Admin
howToStep2: Search for a WO above (e.g. 4001567009) and pick from the list
howToStep3: Enter R/S/T (A) on the paper form or Vibration Dst/dB — tasks prefilled from Master Plan
howToStep4: Save → view charts in Trend panels or per-task blocks below · Excel not required
howToAltExcel: Optional: open «Excel import» at the bottom (bulk / historical)
manualEntryHint: Select a WO above — tasks prefilled from Master Plan · enter values and save
manualEntryAdvancedHint: Use when no task in plan or for Excel-style bulk entry
valuesRequiredDstDb: Enter Dst and dB as valid numbers
selectWoToEnable: Select a work order above to enable save
noWritePermission: View only — confirmation.write permission required to enter and save

paperForm.current3PhaseTitle: 3-phase current check (R / S / T in A)

statusIntro: Check if you can enter and save — forms are never hidden
statusWoMissing: No WO selected — search and pick one above

readiness.intro: Data readiness — manual entry OK even when no readings exist yet

readiness.noTasklist: No task list for mntplan {{mntplan}} — publish Master Plan
readiness.noPmTasks: No PM measurement tasks (3-phase / vibration) — manual entry OK
readiness.noReadings: No saved readings yet — manual entry OK (technician enters values)
readiness.readySave: Readings on file — view charts or add more
readiness.canEnter: Manual entry open — save when values are complete
readiness.manualOkNoReadings: Ready for manual entry — no readings yet · technicians can enter and save now
